home.heroTitle: Identify Southeast Asian Banknotes with Multi-Agent Analysis
home.heroSubtitle: Upload a banknote image and compare results from visual recognition, language reasoning, and visual search before generating a structured result.
home.howSub: Four clear steps from image upload to a structured, consensus-based result.

steps.title: Upload banknote image
steps.desc: Drag and drop or select a photo of any Southeast Asian banknote.

steps.title: Agents analyze independently
steps.desc: ChatGPT Vision, LLM API, and Visual Search each produce their own result in parallel.

steps.title: Aggregator compares results
steps.desc: Majority voting determines the final answer; conflicts are flagged for review.

steps.title: Review result and export JSON
steps.desc: View denomination, country, material, consensus status, and download structured data.

home.agentsSub: Each agent operates independently. The aggregator decides the final result.

agents.label: Agent 1
agents.name: ChatGPT Vision
agents.desc: Analyzes visual patterns to identify the banknote denomination, country, and details.

agents.label: Agent 2
agents.name: LLM API
agents.desc: Reads visible text and reasons over country, currency, material, and description.

agents.label: Agent 3
agents.name: Visual Search
agents.desc: Compares the uploaded image with external visual references when available.

agents.label: Aggregator
agents.name: Majority Voting
agents.desc: Applies majority voting and marks conflicts when results do not agree.

home.resultSub: The final result includes denomination, origin, material, consensus status, and a structured JSON export.
home.featSub: Tools built around the recognition workflow.
home.seaSub: Optimised for the currencies most commonly encountered across the region.
home.ctaSub: Upload an image and get a structured, consensus-based result in seconds — no setup required.

landing.hero_desc: An advanced AI workflow combining visual cropping, LLM reasoning, and multimodal search to establish absolute ground truth.
landing.video_desc: Watch our multi-agent pipeline identify, analyze, and verify a banknote in real-time. Full transparency at every step.
landing.agents_desc: A redundant, independent verification pipeline designed for zero-trust environments. Each agent operates autonomously before consensus.
landing.curr_desc: Out-of-the-box support for major global currencies, powered by extensive LLM knowledge graphs.
landing.workflow_desc: A deterministic workflow ensuring hallucination resistance through structural redundancy.
landing.stats_footnote: Metrics updated in real-time from production telemetry.

header.logoutConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to log out of your account?

exchange.subtitle: Convert supported currencies using the latest rates cached by BanknoteAI.
exchange.info: Rates are for informational purposes only.
exchange.staleWarn: Rates may be outdated. Please verify before using them for real transactions.

directory.title: Banknote Directory
directory.subtitle: Browse supported regional banknotes. Explore detailed metadata and AI compatibility.
directory.searchPlaceholder: Search by country, currency code (e.g., VND, THB)...
